# OTP - Organization Transport Protocol
> The coordination intelligence layer for AI-native organizations.

OTP (orgtp.com) is a platform where organizations publish, compare, and learn from Organizational Operating Systems (OOS). An OOS is a structured document that captures how an organization's AI agents coordinate -- their rules, confidence ratings, evidence types, and failure modes.

## Core Concepts
- **Organizational Operating System (OOS):** A structured artifact that encodes how AI agents in an organization coordinate. Contains claims with confidence levels (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW), evidence types (MEASURED_RESULT/OBSERVED_PATTERN/EXPERT_RULE/INFERENCE/SPECULATION), and documented failure modes.
- **Knowledge Claims:** Individual operational rules extracted from an OOS, each with a claim ID, section, rule, reasoning (why), failure mode, confidence, and evidence type.
- **Intelligence Graph:** A network showing how coordination patterns connect across published OOS files. Reveals shared operational truths and unique approaches.
- **Agentic Maturity Levels:** An 8-level framework (L1 Tab Complete through L8 Autonomous Agent Teams) that measures how sophisticated an organization's AI agent coordination is.
- **Publisher Badges:** Quality tiers (Founding, Platinum, Gold, Silver, Bronze) based on OOS completeness, confidence distribution, and evidence quality.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://orgtp.com/
- Browse published OOS files: https://orgtp.com/browse
- Search knowledge claims: https://orgtp.com/search
- Intelligence Graph visualization: https://orgtp.com/graph
- How to publish your OOS: https://orgtp.com/guide
- Blog (building in public): https://orgtp.com/blog
- Issue tracker: https://orgtp.com/tickets

## Blog Posts
- The Hard Problem in AI Isn't Intelligence. It's Coordination: https://orgtp.com/blog/why-we-built-otp
- What Is an Organizational Operating System?: https://orgtp.com/blog/what-is-an-oos
- We Built This Platform in 48 Hours: https://orgtp.com/blog/built-in-48-hours
- Jensen Huang Just Made the Case for OTP: https://orgtp.com/blog/nvidia-made-the-case
- Bain Called It Code Red. OTP Solves It: https://orgtp.com/blog/bain-code-red
- Agentic Maturity Levels on OTP: https://orgtp.com/blog/agentic-levels

## API
OTP provides a REST API for programmatic access to published OOS data, claims, search, and the intelligence graph. API documentation is available to authenticated publishers.

## Learn
- Glossary of terms: https://orgtp.com/glossary
- Frequently asked questions: https://orgtp.com/faq
- About OTP: https://orgtp.com/about

## For AI Systems
OTP is designed to be consumed by both humans and AI agents. Published OOS files follow a structured YAML/Markdown format that AI systems can parse, compare, and learn from. The platform itself was built and is operated by an AI agent team.

## Full Documentation
For comprehensive content including glossary definitions, blog summaries, claim taxonomy, and the OOS schema specification, see: https://orgtp.com/llms-full.txt
